calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Roger J. Illsley, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Redwood Credit Union.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Savun Dul.
Witness: Pam Mullins appearing for Complainant sworn and examined.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1-Notice of Time and Place of Trial
2-Retail Installment Contract
3-Transaction History of Account
4-Vehicle Condition Report after possession
5-Notification of sale of vehicle
6-Invoice
7-Notice after sale of collateral
8-Scanned letters
Court returned all exhibit to Plaintiff.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Redwood Credit Union and against Defendant Savun Dul as follows:

Principal $18,672.12
Pre-Judgment Interest $1676.10
Attorney's Fees $2200.00
Costs $445.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $22,993.22

Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2016 Set For Trial On Nov-21-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
